_comment: CrateDigger configuration. Copy to ~/.cratedigger/config.json (user) or .cratedigger/config.json (library root). Only include settings you want to override; defaults are built in.
_comment_layout: Folder structure. Available layouts: artist_flat, festival_flat, artist_nested, festival_nested.
_comment_filename: File naming templates. Use Sonarr-style collapsing syntax for optional fields.
_comment_content_type: Glob patterns to force classification. Paths are relative to library root.
_comment_skip: Glob patterns for paths to skip during scanning.
_comment_extensions: Recognized media file extensions, grouped by type.
_comment_fallback: Placeholder values when metadata is missing.
_comment_poster: Background image priority chains for poster generation.
_comment_fanart: fanart.tv settings. The project API key is built in. Add your personal key for faster cache updates (get one at https://fanart.tv/get-an-api-key/).
_comment_kodi: Kodi JSON-RPC settings. Enable to auto-refresh Kodi after enrichment. Path mapping is auto-detected from the Kodi library.
_comment_nfo: Genre tags written into NFO files.
_comment_tools: Set these if the tools are not in your PATH. Use null for auto-detect.
